title: Shot Like Early 2000s American Sitcom Live
sourceTitle: Shot Like Early 2000s American Sitcom Live
prompt: Shot like an early 2000s American sitcom with live studio audience. The woman walks in and notices the lazy unemployed robot sitting around in his singlet and undies. The woman is bossy and has a Northern Irish accent. The robot is dismissive and has a hyper exaggerated, screeching Brooklyn, New York accent. They exchange a ridiculous funny argument. Improvise sitcom like dialogue.
